confusion_points.description: Event cards didn't show titles or descriptions above the fold — had to click blind based on card type/date badges. The card image area just showed a large letter 'W' or 'M' with no readable event name until scrolling further down the card.
The event name 'PubTest-699bcd7b' looks like a test/dummy data artifact, not a real event title. Mildly confusing whether this is production content.

suggestions: Show event titles and brief descriptions on the listing cards so users can make informed click decisions without scrolling into each card.
Ensure event cards display the full event name prominently — not just a large initial letter — so scanning the list is faster and more meaningful.
Add a hover state or tooltip preview on event cards to surface key info (title, location, cost) before committing to a full page load.
